calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, August 19, 2015 in Department 525:
Douglas C. Speck, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Larry Kennedy.
No Appearance by Appellant/Defendant Brian Morgan.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Douglas Speck and witness are sworn.

The Court dismissed the Appeal, no appearance by the appellant/defendant.

Judge Pro Tem Robert Aune; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Judgment Entered
